notes: Background is a placeholder gradient. The Higgsfield-generated background (https://d8j0ntlcm91z4.cloudfront.net/user_3EfvrKsOBiXUO0oiNZNFezXLea0/hf_20260717_230555_ee1a6a23-84ea-48af-bf29-932388c263b5.png) could not be composited in this run because the Higgsfield CDN (d8j0ntlcm91z4.cloudfront.net) is blocked by the egress proxy policy.
